data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_Text_1B25CB: I'm the DAY-CARE MAN.\pI help take care of the precious\nPOKéMON of TRAINERS.\pIf you'd like me to raise your POKéMON,\nhave a word with my wife.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_Text_1B2659: Ah, it's you!\pWe were raising your POKéMON, and my\ngoodness, were we surprised!\pYour POKéMON had an EGG!\pWe don't know how it got there,\nbut your POKéMON had it.\pYou do want it, yes?
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_Text_1B2710: Ah, it's you! Good to see you.\nYour {STR_VAR_1}'s doing fine.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_Text_1B2766: You have no room for it...\nCome back when you've made room.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_Text_1B27A2: {PLAYER} received the EGG from\nthe DAY-CARE MAN.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_Text_1B27E3: By the way, about your {STR_VAR_1},\nit seemed to be friendly with\l{STR_VAR_2}'s {STR_VAR_3}.\pI may even have seen it receiving\na piece of MAIL.
data/text/day_care.inc.UnknownString_81B2858: If you want to pick up your POKéMON,\nhave a word with my wife.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_Text_1B2897: Ah, it's you! Your {STR_VAR_1} and\n{STR_VAR_2} are doing fine.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_Text_1B28C4: I really will keep it.\nYou do want this, yes?
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B28F2: I'm the DAY-CARE LADY.\pWe can raise POKéMON for you.\pWould you like us to raise one?
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B2947: Which POKéMON should we raise for you?
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B296E: Fine, we'll raise your {STR_VAR_1} for\na while.\pCome back for it later.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B29AD: We can raise two of your POKéMON.\nWould you like us to raise one more?
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B29F4: My husband was looking for you.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B2A4F: Will you take back the other one, too?
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B2A88: Ah, it's you! Good to see you.\nYour POKéMON can only be doing good!
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B2AEF: Your POKéMON team is full.\nMake room, then come see me.
data/text/day_care.inc.UnknownString_81B2B27: Which POKéMON will you take back?
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B2B49: If you want your {STR_VAR_1} back,\nit will cost ¥{STR_VAR_2}.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B2BBB: Oh? But you have just one POKéMON.\pCome back another time.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B2BF6: Will you take your POKéMON back?
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B2C17: If you leave me that POKéMON,\nwhat will you battle with?\pCome back another time.
